== topology ==
[Error] g3rs-topology/declared-workspace-members-only crates/member/Cargo.toml Workspace child `crates/member` must be declared explicitly
  `crates/member/Cargo.toml` sits under workspace `.`, but it is not a declared workspace member. Workspace membership must exactly match real child Rust roots. Add this crate's path to `[workspace] members` in `./Cargo.toml`.
